# Geotechnical Engineering — Quebec City

> Geotechnical engineering services in Quebec City, Canada.

- [Resistivity](https://quebec-city.geotechnical-engineering.org/resistivity/)

## About
This site provides geotechnical engineering services in Quebec City, Canada.
Compliant with local and international standards (ASTM, ISO, country-specific norms).
